videos/GlenGouldDoc.mov.description: Documentary footage of Glenn Gould at the piano. Black and white, intimate close-ups of hands and face. Good as anchor — recognizable human presence.

videos/Musique Concrete.mp4.description: Musique concrete documentary. Studio equipment, tape machines, experimental sound. Mid-century aesthetic. Works well with glitch effects.

videos/The New Sound of Music (BBC Do.mp.description: BBC documentary on electronic music. Synthesizers, oscilloscopes, early electronic instruments. Retro-futurist feel.

videos/brakhage-mothlight-slow.mp4.description: Stan Brakhage's Mothlight slowed down. Abstract organic textures — moth wings, seeds, blades of grass pressed onto film. Pure visual texture, no narrative.

textures/noise-color.png.description: Colorful noise pattern. Good as blend layer for adding chromatic texture.

textures/noise-dark-clouds.png.description: Dark cloud-like noise. Good as moody background or subtle overlay.

textures/noise-glitch-bands.png.description: Horizontal glitch bands. Works with glitch effect for doubled distortion.

textures/noise-plasma.png.description: Plasma-style noise gradient. Organic flowing colors, good for colorshift effect.

textures/noise-static.png.description: TV static noise. Raw grain texture, good as subtle overlay.

textures/cal-micrometer.png.description: Technical micrometer calibration image. Fine grid lines, precise geometry.

textures/cal-oscilloscope.png.description: Oscilloscope calibration pattern. Green phosphor on black, retro technical aesthetic.

textures/cal-test-card.png.description: TV test card pattern. Color bars and geometry, broadcast aesthetic.

textures/cal-usaf-target.png.description: USAF resolution target. Concentric line groups, technical/military aesthetic.

textures/chill_pink.png.description: Soft pink gradient. Warm, calm background texture.

photos/BCI_guys copy.png.description: Photo of people at a BCI (brain-computer interface) event.

photos/BCI_oven copy.png.description: Photo from BCI event — oven or equipment shot.

photos/bitmap.jpg.description: Bitmap artwork. Black and white pixel-level composition.

photos/coloredbitmap.png.description: Colored version of bitmap artwork. Pixel art with color.

photos/natto_instructions.png.description: Natto preparation instructions. Japanese food packaging graphics.

photos/nightingale1.png.description: Nightingale image. Could be bird or Florence Nightingale reference.

photos/notart_transparent.png.description: Transparent PNG artwork with 'not art' theme.

photos/replay_memory.jpg.description: Replay memory visualization. Technical/ML concept art.
